action.reasoning: Observation: test with v9 hybrid SPF achieved low safe_follow_steps=13.6 avg (some epis ~36 at good avg_dist=1.58 but others too close at 0.56), nav_seek_success=0.0, found_rate=0.0; crashed on JSON dump due to np.float32. Config confirms exact thresholds (500 steps, [1,2)m, |angle|<0.2618rad). Test took ~28s/ep. Analysis: SPF human_pos calc likely incorrect (other_agent_gps probably global not delta, causing bad goals); action mapping and overrides insufficient for persistent following of random oracle target; earlier reactive versions reached ~50-100 safe steps. JSON error from unhandled numpy types in per-episode/metrics. Root cause: hybrid added bugs without enough standoff/facing persistence. Decision: fix JSON with recursive serializable converter; revert to tuned reactive v10 heuristic (remove SPF, angular_k=-4.5*angle, linear=clip(1.5*(dist-1.5),-0.7,0.9), pure-rotate on |angle|>0.7, depth OA (backup+turn on min_front<1.0, slow on <1.5), detector-boosted stable follow (linear=0.25, tighter angular when visible+in-range+good-angle), deadzone, backup on <0.9); complete full non-truncated predict.py+test_full_episode.py with v10, expanded per-epi diagnostics (min_dist,collisions,detector_on,safe_ratio), proper output dir creation; run test_full_episode.py for validation/improvement before submit_eval on predict.py (dummy ckpt v10).
